title: Yellow Jacket Removal in Union City, NJ | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional yellow jacket removal in Union City, NJ. Safe, effective nest elimination for homes and businesses. Price range $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Union City.
intro: Yellow jackets pose a serious threat to Union City residents, especially during late summer when colonies reach peak size. These aggressive wasps often build nests in the eaves of Union City's densely packed residential buildings, wall voids, and around the many parks and green spaces throughout the area. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe yellow jacket removal services to protect your family and property.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians have extensive experience handling yellow jacket infestations in Union City's unique urban environment, from the multi-family homes near Bergenline Avenue to properties overlooking the Hudson River. We use proven removal methods that eliminate the entire colony while ensuring the safety of your household and neighbors in this close-knit community.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Union City, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are quite common in Union City, especially from July through October. The area's combination of residential buildings, gardens, and proximity to the Hudson River provides ample food sources and nesting sites. They're frequently found in wall voids, under decks, and in attic spaces of Union City homes.
